limitations: Not eligibility, expanded-access, monitoring, referral, or sequencing guidance.
Does not claim that multiple myeloma has been cured.
Does not rank relapse mechanisms, products, targets, trials, sources, artifacts, or evidence.
Does not establish clinical actionability for any mechanism or measurement.
Does not use real case data, patient-identifying data, private records, or private expert correspondence.
Mechanism statements require source-specific extraction and expert review before educational reuse.
Coverage counts remain public artifact coverage metrics, not mechanism frequency or biological priority.
